findings.description: Header text block lost right-alignment and two-column structure.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the names and titles (e.g., 'PAT MCCRORY Governor') are right-aligned opposite the logo. In the HTML, this text block is left-aligned directly below the logo.

findings.description: Memo routing block lost tabular alignment.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the text following 'To:', 'From:', and 'Subject:' is horizontally aligned to create a second column. In the HTML, this alignment is lost and the text wraps directly after the labels.

findings.description: Page numbers and footers are inserted inline, occasionally interrupting sentences that span across page breaks.
findings.evidence:
In the HTML, sentences are broken by page footers, such as: '...after everyone that registered to

Page 2 of 4

speak was finished.' and '...do not present a

Page 3 of 4

substantial likelihood...'
